lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but remains free of significant dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and the car has been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor paint chips and a few light scratches from regular use. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and the vehicle has a consistent service history.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior remains in like-new condition with no signs of wear. It has been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Mechanically, it is perfect, offering a driving experience identical to when it first left the factory. This is a rare find for a discerning collector or enthusiast looking for a truly mint example.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly showroom quality. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or dents, and the interior is spotless, smelling like new with no signs of wear on the upholstery or dashboard. Mechanically, it is perfect; the engine runs silently and the transmission shifts seamlessly. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history and has always been garage-kept. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in its original, pristine state.

Ready for a rewarding project? This vehicle is the perfect starting point for any DIY enthusiast or mechanic looking to restore a car with great potential! While it currently requires significant mechanical work and body repairs, it offers an affordable way to own a sought-after model. Grab your tools and bring this beauty back to its former glory!

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. This specimen has been subject to rigorous standards of care, ensuring its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal remain firmly intact. A distinguished option for those seeking a dependable yet premium driving experience, this vehicle offers exceptional value within its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? This car has been well-loved and runs like a charm. It’s in really solid shape and is more than ready for its next big adventure with a new owner. It’s been a joy to drive, and I’m sure you’ll love it too! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take it for a spin!
Available is a driver-focused 2008 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style, having been kept in consistent, well-cared-for condition. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, with the bodywork showing only the minor, superficial character marks typical of a well-loved daily driver. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are intact and comfortable, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, offering a smooth ride with a responsive engine and a transmission that shifts without hesitation. It has been serviced regularly, with recent oil changes and a thorough multi-point inspection already completed. If you are looking for a dependable, turn-key vehicle that looks great in the driveway and performs even better on the road, this is the one.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience that balances performance with proven reliability. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and long-term value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and dependable engineering, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and honestly, it’s in great shape and totally ready for its next adventure! It runs like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I just know you’re going to love driving it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement, addressing the platform's known structural weak points, while the suspension retains its factory-tuned damping characteristics for optimal turn-in response. Though the exterior displays minor stone chips and aesthetic wear expected of a well-loved driver, the mechanical vitals are robust, with a recently serviced cooling system and a valve adjustment performed within
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Service records included. No mechanical issues. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily-driver utility and premium performance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road-wear expected of a well-loved car, while the alloy wheels remain free of major blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a clean, non-smoker environment featuring supple leather upholstery with only light softening on the driver’s side bolster. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is solid; it has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that pulls cleanly through the gears. Garage-kept and accompanied by a complete set of service records, this car offers a turn-key experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophistication. This automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership, offering a refined driving experience and exceptional value for the discerning motorist.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies balanced performance and enduring quality. It presents in commendable condition, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. A premier choice for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car! It’s in really wonderful shape and has been so reliable for me. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is totally ready for all your upcoming road trips. I’ve truly loved driving this beauty, and I know you will too! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come see it in person!

Up for sale is a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 high-revving naturally aspirated V8. This unit retains its mechanical integrity with recent preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC), the chassis remains composed through aggressive cornering. While the exterior shows minor signs of spirited use consistent with its age, the powertrain remains robust and the 8,400 RPM induction howl is intoxicating. A true enthusiast's spec ready for the canyons.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable engine. Ready for sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been loved and driven. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the premium leather upholstery is free of tears, the dashboard remains crack-free, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid flushes and a fresh set of high-performance tires. It provides a smooth, confident ride with no unusual noises or vibrations. Whether you are commuting or taking a weekend getaway, this car offers reliability and comfort without the 'new car' price tag. Clean title in hand, non-smoker interior, and ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a fusion of performance and reliability. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for quality and safety. The interior remains refined, complemented by an exterior that reflects diligent ownership. We invite you to experience a vehicle that delivers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value.

It offers a distinguished driving profile, balancing robust performance with long-term reliability. Each component has been vetted to meet our rigorous standards, ensuring a sophisticated ownership experience for the discerning professional who values both quality and value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s still got so much life left in her! It's been super well-maintained and runs like a dream. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable, comfy car that’s ready to hit the road today. You’re going to love driving this one!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis is mechanically sound, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Recent maintenance includes a full Vanos service and rod bearing replacement to ensure long-term reliability. Riding on staggered
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, perfect for someone seeking a dependable daily driver that has been treated with care. The exterior finish retains a high gloss, with only minor, age-appropriate road wear that does not detract from its overall sharp presence. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the bolsters on the seats remain firm, and every button, dial, and digital display functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-ready from day one. It drives straight, brakes confidently, and offers a quiet, comfortable ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This meticulously maintained example offers a refined driving experience, ensuring executive-level presence on the road. Having undergone a rigorous inspection to confirm its superior mechanical and aesthetic integrity, this vehicle stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver who values both consistency and long-term value.
